overall.description: A first-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza, starting from an abandoned military vehicle covered in graffiti, ascending stairs past a fallen giant statue, and exploring an open upper plaza with towering skyscrapers and neon signage. The environment features a mix of high-tech architecture and post-apocalyptic decay with sand-covered walkways.

moving out from under overpass into open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a partially covered overpass, focusing on an abandoned military vehicle covered in graffiti. The camera moves steadily past the vehicle as pedestrians walk by, transitioning from the sheltered area toward an open plaza visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open plaza, the camera reveals a massive fallen statue surrounded by commercial buildings with bright signage. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase on the right, moving away from the statue toward an upper level.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stairs past metal scaffolding, reaching an upper plaza with palm trees. The view opens to reveal a massive gold-striped skyscraper, and the camera tilts upward to admire its height against the cloudy sky before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with neon buildings and digital advertisements

approaching group of characters near circular planter with palm tree

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open upper plaza, the camera passes palm trees and approaches a distinctive pink neon building on the left. The environment features digital billboards and scattered pedestrians, with the gold-striped skyscraper now visible to the right as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, gritty underpass into a sprawling, high-tech upper plaza. It begins beneath a partially covered overpass, gliding past a graffiti-covered abandoned military vehicle and passing pedestrians as it moves toward the light of an open square. As the camera emerges into the plaza, the view reveals a massive fallen statue flanked by commercial buildings before the perspective shifts upward, ascending a wide stone staircase past metal scaffolding. The scene then opens onto an elevated terrace with palm trees, where the camera tilts up to capture the immense scale of a gold-striped skyscraper against a cloudy sky. Finally, the movement continues through the upper plaza, passing digital billboards and pedestrians toward a distinctive pink neon building.
